# MVP Scope

The minimum viable product focuses on the core coaching loop informed by [[problem-definition]] research and [[market-analysis]] positioning.

Key features for MVP:
1. AI-powered methodology coaching (from problem-definition insights)
2. Real-time venture intelligence (from market-analysis data)
3. Cross-section relationship discovery

The convergence of coaching and intelligence creates a unique value proposition that appears across problem-definition, market-analysis, and solution-design sections.
